languages.text: "Позвольте помочь!" {n}Одарив вас опасливым взглядом, Ведка бросается вслед за Себерианом.{/n}
languages.translation_comment:
Архимилитант Дунавски
Дунавски убегает вслед за Себерианом

languages.text: "Let me help!" {n}Dunawski, giving you a concerned look, rushes after Seberian.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Позвольте помочь!" {n}Одарив вас опасливым взглядом, Ведка бросается вслед за Себерианом.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Let me help!" {n}Dunawski, giving you a concerned look, rushes after Seberian.{/n}

"Let me help!" {n}Vedka, giving you a concerned look, rushes over to assist the officers. Propping up the massive Rogue Trader with her shoulder, she leads him off the bridge, unable to hide the strain.{/n}

"Let me help!" {n}Dunawski, giving you a concerned look, rushes after Seberian.{/n}

languages.text: «Déjeme ayudar!». {n}Dunawski te mira con preocupación y corre tras Seberian.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Let me help!" {n}Dunawski, giving you a concerned look, rushes after Seberian.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Déjeme ayudar!». {n}Dunawski te mira con preocupación y corre tras Seberian.{/n}

languages.text: “我来帮忙！”{n}杜纳芙斯卡忧心忡忡地看了你一眼，赶紧朝塞贝里安跑了过去。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Let me help!" {n}Dunawski, giving you a concerned look, rushes after Seberian.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “我来帮忙！”{n}杜纳芙斯卡忧心忡忡地看了你一眼，赶紧朝塞贝里安跑了过去。{/n}

languages.text: « Laissez-moi vous aider ! » {n}Dunawski vous lance un regard inquiet, puis se précipite à la suite de Seberian.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Let me help!" {n}Dunawski, giving you a concerned look, rushes after Seberian.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Laissez-moi vous aider ! » {n}Dunawski vous lance un regard inquiet, puis se précipite à la suite de Seberian.{/n}

languages.text: "Yardım etmeme izin verin!" {n}Dunawski sana endişeli bir bakış atarak Seberian'ın peşinden koşuyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Let me help!" {n}Dunawski, giving you a concerned look, rushes after Seberian.{/n}

languages.text: 「手伝わせて！」{n}ダナウスキーは心配そうに君を見つめ、シベリアを追いかけていく.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Let me help!" {n}Dunawski, giving you a concerned look, rushes after Seberian.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「手伝わせて！」{n}ダナウスキーは心配そうに君を見つめ、シベリアを追いかけていく.{/n}

languages.text: "Lasst mich helfen!" {n}Dunawski wirft dir einen besorgten Blick zu und eilt hinter Seberian her.{/n}
